is a fictional character from Stage Evangelion Beyond stage play.

Profile

She is the leader of the Strategic Operations Section. In addition to commanding the battles against the Angels, she is also in charge of caring for the pilots. Theatre cocoon Evangelion Beyond p.39 

History

Stage Evangelion Beyond

Trivia

The character portrayed by Shizuka Ishibashi was initially named , the name was later changed.
